arts.ttl: Owen Hargreaves and Robbie Savage give Ruben Amorim 'harsh' low scores when asked to rate his start to life as Man United manager
arts.sum: Amorim has not enjoyed a dream start to life as Manchester United manager. He won just seven of his first 17 games in the job, losing seven and drawing three.

arts.ttl: LIVE: FCSB host Man United in Europa League final group stage
Why Amad and Alejandro Garnacho don't start for Manchester United vs FCSB
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim has had to rotate his team for Thursday night's Europa League clash with FCSB in Romania.

arts.ttl: Manchester United sent Marcus Rashford transfer message as time runs out in frustrating talks

arts.sum: The January transfer window is coming to an end, and a move for Rashford will be difficult

arts.ttl: Steaua Bucharest v Manchester United: Europa League – live
arts.sum: Europa League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off Spurs v Elfsborg, Rangers v Union SG – clockwatch Live scoreboard | How they stand | Email Michael 4 min: Collyer, the young United midfielder, has already done a good job of diffusing some of that early tension with a couple of nice chest traps and passes to help settle the visitors down. 2 min: Sut, Steaua’s captain, snarls into a couple of early challenges in midfield. Every time there is a home touch on the ball, the crowd go wild. The atmosphere is electric! Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Romano – Napoli close in on winger as Chelsea left in pole position to sign Man Utd attacker Garnacho
arts.sum: Napoli have seemingly decided to move away from pursuing Manchester United winger Alejandro Garnacho, according to Fabrizio Romano. The Serie A club were thought to be in a head-to-head battle with Chelsea for the 20-year-old, who appears to be open to a switch away from Old Trafford. Now it seems that Enzo Maresca’s men may […] The post Romano – Napoli close in on winger as Chelsea left in pole position to sign Man Utd attacker Garnacho appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man United's Patrick Dorgu deal 'delayed': When could 20-year-old make Red Devils debut?
arts.sum: Patrick Dorgu's switch to Manchester United from Lecce is allegedly delayed, with the Denmark international now not expected to travel to England until Saturday.
